_source: Plan v4 §8 — registered search space for the mutation engine. LLM may propose mutation_ids that map to a dimension below; LLM cannot add new dimensions.
_note: Dimensions are pre-committed BEFORE any mutation runs. Adding a dimension is a loosening action; it requires a new dated search_space_vN.json + the validation policy cooldown.

parameter:lookback_months._note: Time-series momentum lookback window in months. v1 default is the 12-month TSM baseline.

parameter:skip_months._note: Skip the most recent N months when computing the momentum signal.

parameter:rebalance_cadence._note: Rebalance frequency. v1 thesis is monthly; weekly is allowed only after passing its own validation.

parameter:max_per_name_gross_pct._note: Per-name gross cap. Tighter (10) is allowed; looser is forbidden (risk policy caps elsewhere).

feature:signal_sign_only._note: When true: long iff signal>0, flat otherwise. v1 thesis uses sign-only.

universe:etf_set._note: Universes must be options-eligible, tight spreads, no leveraged/inverse, no single-stock idio risk. The default is the 10-name v1 universe.

exclusions._note: Combinations explicitly forbidden — these die at intake.

require.validation_artifact_id: must reference a weekly-cadence Tier-1 pass
